text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This is not a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everything that happens from now on is real.
That's why I have to make sure to witness it with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll create striking memories for myself—for
everyone! And I'll make each and every moment
shine brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Time to go.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You know something, Trainer? I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't finish her sentence, but it's
enough. I understand exactly what she's feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day it was decided she would run in the
Twinkle Series, Fine Motion's eyes sparkled
brightly, and her excitement for the future
swelled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she heads towards her glorious finale, she
looks more beautiful than I can ever remember
seeing her.
choice_data_list: Go out there and have fun!
Go out there and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I will! See you soon!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can finally race you at the top of your game. I've
really been looking forward to this!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Scarlet... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why are you apologizing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I know how much you love being number
one. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'll be number one today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I see you're not planning on holding back!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's great, because I have no intention of
giving up first place! Apologies if I don't let you
go out with all the glory!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...On that note, I still have some preparations to
take care of. See you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I had hoped this day would come—that I would
have the opportunity to run with you in a race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, what better final opponent could there
be than the person I started with?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I don't feel an ounce of sentiment toward you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You made your decision in the end. ...Everything
came together just the way I predicted.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You couldn't do it. So now... I have to do it
myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to tear it all down. Bugs in the system,
your conviction—I'll crush them both.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Damn it. What the hell is that look?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I didn't say all that to get you excited.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But you're oh-so noble right now! How could I
possibly maintain my composure?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come at me with everything you've got. Give me
that passion!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ha! Is this the real you? I like you better this way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That smug grin, acting like you had it all figured
out. ...You were really getting on my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how funny. Is it just me, or does it sound
like you're saying you like me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?! Have you lost your mind?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, perhaps! Maybe I was just a bit confused.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Now, let's hurry up and race!
